style_reference_layout.motif_signature: source-first lab report with run metadata plate, table/figure evidence, and traceable refs::top-bottom lab rules|plain no-rule evidence page|run metadata plate|semantic result table|refs footer::bind sample/run/method metadata to structured title, caption, or table fields|prefer lab-run-results and scientific-figure variants before generic prose|use compact footer source IDs plus editable references tables for dense source material
